name: Immovable
description:
This rune utilizes magical principles used in an .

Activate 1 Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect Your armor anchors you in place, even defying gravity, rendering you until you Dismiss the Activation. While you're immobilized in this way, you can be moved only if a creature succeeds at a check to your armor. You can also be moved if 8,000 pounds of pressure are placed upon you, though this is likely fatal.
